Opcode.name: PCM_OP_SUBSCRIPTION_GET_PURCHASED_OFFERINGS
Opcode.Doc: This opcode is used to fetch the purchased products and discounts for a given account, service or billinfo.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SCOPE_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Account, Service or Billinfo object that define the scope of the search for products and discounts.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_STATUS_FLAGS
Int.Doc:
This field specifies the statuses for the offerings. The values of the flags can be:
PIN_SUBS_FLG_OFFERING_STATUS_ACTIVE - Fetches only active offerings.
PIN_SUBS_FLG_OFFERING_STATUS_INACTIVE - Fetches only inactive offerings.
PIN_SUBS_FLG_OFFERING_STATUS_CLOSED - Fetches only closed offerings. Note: Use of multiple values implies the target object should satisfy any of the above.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: Specifies the date on which the offering is valid. This field is used in conjunction with the validity flags

Int.name: PIN_FLD_VALIDITY_FLAGS
Int.Doc:
This field specifies the qualifiers for END_T. The values of the flags can be:
PIN_SUBS_FLG_OFFERING_VALIDITY_CYCLE - to compare only the CYCLE start and end dates.
PIN_SUBS_FLG_OFFERING_VALIDITY_PURCHASE - to compare only the PURCHASE start and end dates.
PIN_SUBS_FLG_OFFERING_VALIDITY_USAGE - to compare only the USAGE start and end dates. Note: Use of multiple flags implies the target object should satisfy all of the above.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_INCLUSION_FLAGS
Int.Doc:
This field specifies additional paramenters to expand the search beyond the scope provided. The values of the flags can be:
PIN_SUBS_FLG_INCLUDE_ALL_ELIGIBLE_PRODS - Fetches the products from the given service, its subscription service as well as any account-level products.
PIN_SUBS_FLG_INCLUDE_ALL_ELIGIBLE_DISCS - Fetches the discounts from the given service, its subscription service as well as any account-level discounts.
PIN_SUBS_FLG_INCLUDE_ALL_SUBSCRIPTION_SERVICES - Includes its subscription services.
PIN_SUBS_FLG_INCLUDE_SUBSCRIBER_CONTRACTS - Fetches subscriber contracts for the given scope.
PIN_SUBS_FLG_INCLUDE_OFFERING_OVERRIDES- Fetches offering overrides for the given products/discounts.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_OVERRIDE_FLAGS
Int.Doc:
This field specifies additional filters to restrict the search. The values of the flags can be:
PIN_SUBS_FLG_ACCT_LEVEL_ONLY - only account level offerings are returned. Valid for Scope = /account only.
PIN_SUBS_FLG_OVERRIDE_PRODS_ONLY - This flag is based on value of PIN_FLD_OVERRIDDEN_OBJ. - if the PIN_FLD_OVERRIDDEN_OBJ is NULL, using this flag fetches only the base products. - if the PIN_FLD_OVERRIDDEN_OBJ is a valid poid, using this flag fetches only the overriding products.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_SELECT_RESULT
Int.Doc:
This field is set to fetch all the records from audit table with the greatest effective_t. The values of the flags can be:
4 - Fetch all records from audit table with the greatest effective_t

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_OVERRIDDEN_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Offering object POID. Only offerings that are overriding this offering will be returned.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_DEAL_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Deal object POID. Only offerings that are part of this deal are returned.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_PACKAGE_ID
Int.Doc: Only offerings for the given package_id are returned. It becomes mandatory if PIN_FLD_INCLUSION_FLAGS contains PIN_SUBS_FLG_INCLUDE_SUBSCRIBER_CONTRACTS.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_PRODUCTS
Array.Doc: If this array is passed, only the fields passed under this array would be returned from the /purchased_product. If not passed, all the fields for the offering would be returned.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_DISCOUNTS
Array.Doc: If this array is passed, only the fields passed under this array would be returned from the /purchased_discount. If not passed, all the fields for the offering would be returned.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_CONTRACTS
Array.Doc: The array of purchased subscriber contracts meeting the input criteria.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_PRODUCTS
Array.Doc: The array of purchased products meeting the input criteria. If specific fields are asked for via the input PIN_FLD_PRODUCTS array, then only those fields are returned. Otherwise, poid of /purchased_product is returned, with the PIN_FLD_POID field being returned as PIN_FLD_OFFERING_OBJ.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_DISCOUNTS
Array.Doc: The array of purchased discounts meeting the input criteria. If specific fields are asked for via the input PIN_FLD_DISCOUNTS array, then only those fields are returned. Otherwise, poid of /purchased_discount is returned, with the PIN_FLD_POID field being returned as PIN_FLD_OFFERING_OBJ.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
